hero.description: React Native Developer with 4+ years of experience building mobile applications from zero to production — including full ownership of App Store and Google Play launches.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: React Native Developer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping mobile applications from zero to production. I've owned the full development lifecycle — from architecture decisions and feature development to App Store Connect management, EAS Build configuration, TestFlight distribution, and successful releases on both the App Store and Google Play. I work with React Native, Expo, TypeScript, and modern tooling to deliver clean, performant UIs and scalable codebases.
